Video.summary: Because of messages Dashana found on social media and her new boyfriend's phone, she suspects he is cheating; Richard says his girlfriend's family found her in bed with another man and forced her to tell him; Sean sets up cameras to spy on his wife.
Video.title: Shocking Cheating Confessions

Image.alt: Shocking Cheating Confessions
Shocking Cheating Confessions
Shocking Cheating Confessions

Video.summary: Rashelle's here to find out how close Jessica and Richard have really become. Then, Sean says that his dream is to marry his fiancee Jessica by the lake. But before the couple takes the plunge, he's got to get some secrets off of his chest
Video.title: Big Blow Offs

Image.alt: Big Blow Offs
Big Blow Offs
Big Blow Offs

Video.summary: A transgendered woman's boyfriend has a confession to make; Kelsey is ready to take her relationship off life support and get together with someone else; Samantha admits to hooking up with her friend's boyfriend.
Video.title: Slapped With the Truth

Image.alt: Slapped With the Truth
Slapped With the Truth
Slapped With the Truth

Video.summary: Carla has been cheating on her man with his best friend and his sister! Next Yvonne will tell her friend, Marie, that she's been sleeping with her boyfriend. Then Mary Sue and her secret lover, Cory, are here to confront Mary Sue's boyfriend, Scott.
Video.title: Honey, I'm Leaving You!

Image.alt: Honey, I'm Leaving You!
Honey, I'm Leaving You!
Honey, I'm Leaving You!

Video.summary: Chris claims that Brianna's very controlling and doesn't let him go out to do the things that make him happy. Then, Chad is here to propose to his girlfriend Star but before they book the caterer, Star has a little confession to make.
Video.title: Best Friend Beatdown

Image.alt: Best Friend Beatdown
Best Friend Beatdown
Best Friend Beatdown

Video.summary: Kendra is on a mission to save her from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.
Video.title: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom

Image.alt: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom

Video.summary: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be a prostitute. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!
Video.title: A Shocking Betrayal

Image.alt: A Shocking Betrayal
A Shocking Betrayal
A Shocking Betrayal

Video.summary: Sherronda and Derrick are back! He’s accusing her of cheating with his best friend of 40 years, Leslie! Next, Amanda admitted to cheating on Eli a few months ago, but now suspects Eli of doing the same to even the score!
Video.title: Betrayed By My Life Long Friend?

Image.alt: Betrayed By My Life Long Friend?
Betrayed By My Life Long Friend?
Betrayed By My Life Long Friend?

Video.summary: Secrets revealed ... Since the start of their relationship, Nareda has slowly been discovering more and more of Kenny's secrets. On their wedding day, she first learned that he had lied about his age and was only 18 years old, much younger than she. She also came to learn he was verbally and physically abusive. Now that she suspects he's been cheating, she wants the truth, and she's making a final decision on her misleading relationship.
Video.title: Not A Big Shocker

Image.alt: Not A Big Shocker
Not A Big Shocker
Not A Big Shocker

Video.summary: Debbie is concerned that her daughter, Heather, is so preoccupied with breaking up her relationship, that she is neglecting her children. Plus, Stephen is here because he's concerned that his daughters are being abused by his ex-wife's boyfriend.
Video.title: Your Kids Can't Live Like This

Image.alt: Your Kids Can't Live Like This
Your Kids Can't Live Like This
Your Kids Can't Live Like This

Video.summary: Michael and Flora are no longer dating, but they have a 3 year old daughter together. Michael thinks that Flora’s boyfriend Dwayne is abusing his daughter, but is he telling the truth? Watch Steve get to the bottom of this!
Video.title: 3 Year Old Locked in the Basement

Image.alt: 3 Year Old Locked in the Basement
3 Year Old Locked in the Basement
3 Year Old Locked in the Basement

Video.summary: Sabrionna has been waiting to return for a DNA and lie detector test to prove that Anthony’s the father and she has been faithful to him! Then, Patrick returns to prove that he’s not the father of Angel’s baby while her man Dale fumes!
Video.title: She Gave Birth 5 Days Ago, Am I The Father?

Image.alt: She Gave Birth 5 Days Ago, Am I The Father?
She Gave Birth 5 Days Ago, Am I The Father?
She Gave Birth 5 Days Ago, Am I The Father?

Video.summary: Perry and Stephanie started having an affair while Ashley was at rehab. Now Ashley is here to confront Perry for not taking responsibility for their daughter. Then, after they split up, Amanda started accusing James' new girlfriend of being abusive.
Video.title: Angry Moms Confront

Image.alt: Angry Moms Confront
Angry Moms Confront
Angry Moms Confront

Video.summary: Alex says he was forced into his relationship with his girlfriend, and he has a secret to reveal; two women wrestle in applesauce for Lexi's love; Tai has moved from Atlanta to Ohio to be with his baby-mama, but she has a confession to make.
Video.title: Fall Flings

Image.alt: Fall Flings
Fall Flings
Fall Flings

Video.summary: Barin's new girlfriend has a secret; Ericka disapproves of her sister's girlfriend; another man may ruin Tyler's wedding.
Video.title: My Big Gay Wedding

Image.alt: My Big Gay Wedding
My Big Gay Wedding
My Big Gay Wedding

Video.summary: Tori confesses that she has been sleeping with her mother's boyfriend; Tabitha wants her man to admit to his wrongdoing; Daniel pleads his case through song.
Video.title: Mom, We're Sleeping With Your Man

Image.alt: Mom, We're Sleeping With Your Man
Mom, We're Sleeping With Your Man
Mom, We're Sleeping With Your Man

Video.summary: Paige disapproves of her sister's boyfriend and devises a plan to get her to leave him; another woman may foil Derek's plans to make his girlfriend a permanent part of his life; Tony wants his cousin's girlfriend.
Video.title: I Was Set Up!

Image.alt: I Was Set Up!
I Was Set Up!
I Was Set Up!

Video.summary: Jessica wants to break up with her rapper boyfriend, but he proposes marriage; Carly reveals her true feelings for her close friend; Nicole, who has been with her boyfriend for five years, wants to know why he hasn't divorced his wife yet.
Video.title: Hunting for a Man

Image.alt: Hunting for a Man
Hunting for a Man
Hunting for a Man

Video.summary: Joanne wants to have a threesome with her friend and the friend's boyfriend; Ron's girlfriend is insanely jealous for a reason; Jazmen confronts her boyfriend and a woman he has been sexting.
Video.title: Girlfriends Get Rolled

Image.alt: Girlfriends Get Rolled
Girlfriends Get Rolled
Girlfriends Get Rolled

Video.summary: These guests say they are willing to betray family and friends in their quest to find a lover.
Video.title: Angry Lovers Attack!!

Image.alt: Angry Lovers Attack!!
Angry Lovers Attack!!
Angry Lovers Attack!!

Video.summary: Nina’s dying husband admitted to sleeping with her sister Nadia. Nadia claims she got an STD from sleeping with Nina’s husband Mike. Then, Eva suspects her fourth husband is cheating with her pregnant niece and is also the father of her baby!
Video.title: Before My Husband Died He Confessed He Slept With My Sister!

Image.alt: Before My Husband Died He Confessed He Slept With My Sister!
Before My Husband Died He Confessed He Slept With My Sister!
Before My Husband Died He Confessed He Slept With My Sister!

Video.summary: Afler the death of her husband, Louise met the man that she thought was her second chance at love. But now she questions if their entire has been a sham! And, Jennifer caught her husband Robert making plans to meet women who live out of state.
Video.title: Prove My Husband Is Not The Father of My Kids!

Image.alt: Prove My Husband Is Not The Father of My Kids!
Prove My Husband Is Not The Father of My Kids!
Prove My Husband Is Not The Father of My Kids!

Video.summary: Jody decided to tell his daughter Kimberly at the age of 7 that he isn't her father because of a spat he had with her mother Laura. But 13 years later, Jody has a change of heart and wants to get back involved in Kimberly's life.
Video.title: I Hope My Ex-Husband Is Not My Daughter's Father!

Image.alt: I Hope My Ex-Husband Is Not My Daughter's Father!
I Hope My Ex-Husband Is Not My Daughter's Father!
I Hope My Ex-Husband Is Not My Daughter's Father!

Video.summary: They're back! Nadia and Nina hadn't spoken to each other in four years because Nadia was accused of sleeping with Nina's husband before he died. The lie detector proved Nadia's innocence. So were the sisters able to mend their relationship?
Video.title: After The Secrets and Results. Outrageous Updates!

Image.alt: After The Secrets and Results. Outrageous Updates!
After The Secrets and Results. Outrageous Updates!
After The Secrets and Results. Outrageous Updates!

Video.summary: Ray Ray is convinced that her fiance DJ is cheating on her. Instead of planning her wedding, she has been conducting her own private investigations. Then, every time Jerrica suspects that her husband is cheating, they pack up and move.
Video.title: If You're Cheating The Wedding is Off!

Image.alt: If You're Cheating The Wedding is Off!
If You're Cheating The Wedding is Off!
If You're Cheating The Wedding is Off!

Video.summary: Is Michael the father of Mikaela and Catequa? London, Ieesha and Reggie are here today to find out if they are one of Mohammed’s 40 children! Mohammed denies it, but can’t run this time! Then, did Nicole cheat on Ted?
Video.title: You Have 18 Kids…We Will Prove You Are Our Dad!

Image.alt: You Have 18 Kids…We Will Prove You Are Our Dad!
You Have 18 Kids…We Will Prove You Are Our Dad!
You Have 18 Kids…We Will Prove You Are Our Dad!

Video.summary: Ron is investigating who has been stealing money from his bedroom. His prime suspects are his daughters, his wife Emily and her son Jeremy. And later Lori is also missing items in her home, including a handgun and she suspects her daughter Courtney.
Video.title: Will The Lie Detector Test Tear Our Family Apart?

Image.alt: Will The Lie Detector Test Tear Our Family Apart?
Will The Lie Detector Test Tear Our Family Apart?
Will The Lie Detector Test Tear Our Family Apart?

Video.summary: Tempestt believes Marquis has stolen money from her and cheated with other women! Then, 42-year-old Mary was just 13 when she met Mark, but now she’s unsure if her husband is cheating on her! What do the lie detector tests say?
Video.title: Is The Man I Love Cheating and Stealing From Me?

Image.alt: Is The Man I Love Cheating and Stealing From Me?
Is The Man I Love Cheating and Stealing From Me?
Is The Man I Love Cheating and Stealing From Me?

Video.summary: Roshana and Shanea grew up believing that Dwayne was their father. But when Dwayne's new wife came into the picture, she started claiming that Roshana and Shanaa are not his children. Now Dwayne also thinks he is not their father.
Video.title: You Lied For 30 Years and I'll Prove It!

Image.alt: You Lied For 30 Years and I'll Prove It!
You Lied For 30 Years and I'll Prove It!
You Lied For 30 Years and I'll Prove It!

Video.summary: Daric denies he is the father of Sarah's baby because he was only intimate with her one time. Later, Candice is desperate to prove to her husband Sam that she has not cheated on him and that her kids are in-fact his.
Video.title: These Children Need Their Fathers.

Image.alt: These Children Need Their Fathers.
These Children Need Their Fathers.
These Children Need Their Fathers.

Video.summary: Briana fell in love with Joe three years ago. Although she loved him, Briana admits that she cheated on Joe and had a baby. And later, Sadaris is accusing Miriam of cheating with Derrick, and he believes that Derrick may be the father of her son.
Video.title: 3 Men...3 DNA Tests…The Truth Comes Out Today!

Image.alt: 3 Men...3 DNA Tests…The Truth Comes Out Today!
3 Men...3 DNA Tests…The Truth Comes Out Today!
3 Men...3 DNA Tests…The Truth Comes Out Today!

Video.summary: Chad’s mother and sister, both named Tammy, claim his ex-girlfriend April cheated. They think she was with other men during the entire relationship and her 3 children may not be his. Later, Kira says her boyfriend Terry is a cheater!
Video.title: Secrets Revealed…I'm The Woman Your Man Is Cheating With!

Image.alt: Secrets Revealed…I'm The Woman Your Man Is Cheating With!
Secrets Revealed…I'm The Woman Your Man Is Cheating With!
Secrets Revealed…I'm The Woman Your Man Is Cheating With!

Video.summary: An aunt seeks an intervention for her teen niece Deborah who parties, smokes, drinks and neglects her baby. Later, Trisha helps a teen mom who believes it’s her right to party and do drugs while her adopted parents care for her 3-month old son.
Video.title: Stop My Teen From Partying…She Just Had A Baby!

Image.alt: Stop My Teen From Partying…She Just Had A Baby!
Stop My Teen From Partying…She Just Had A Baby!
Stop My Teen From Partying…She Just Had A Baby!
